title: Checkout 500 Error - Stripe Payment Processing Failing
description: Critical production issue: All checkout attempts are failing with 500 Internal Server Error. Error appears during payment processing step. Stripe webhook logs show uncaught exception. Error in logs: TypeError: Cannot read property 'id' of undefined at processPayment. Stack trace points to payments-stripe plugin. Started ~30 minutes ago, affecting 100% of checkout attempts. Revenue impact: ~$50k/hour.

triage_verdict.severity_reasoning: Complete checkout failure affecting 100% of transactions, critical revenue impact
triage_verdict.root_cause_hypothesis: Null pointer exception in Stripe payment processor when handling payment intent ID

relevant_files.reason: Core payment processing logic, error originates here
Calls payment plugin, may have context on error handling

recommended_actions: Check Stripe payment intent ID handling in checkout.js
Verify recent commits to payments-stripe plugin
Review error logs around 30 minutes ago
